Name: Deploy decision and hosted smoke
Outcome: Current public deployment is deployed and smoke-tested
Details: Final production deploy dpl_DfbzrJq54MMsf7anhc2xLFwpBvKp is aliased to https://classloop-followup.vercel.app, serves fingerprinted assets /assets/index-CkXZY_H5.js and /assets/index-BgBlv9cx.css, and passed npm run test:web plus npm run test:web:local.

Name: Legal/public signup readiness
Details: Review Terms, Privacy Policy, support contact, EULA, retention/deletion expectations, and child-safety language. Keep durable hosted signups gated/sample-only until docs are public.

Name: Desktop release package
Outcome: Teacher can download/install with clear expectations
Details: Package macOS, generate checksums, confirm download fallback/URLs, and update install guidance for unsigned/ad-hoc builds.

Name: Backend production config
Outcome: Supabase/Stripe setup has a verified production path
Details: Verify Supabase/Stripe env setup plan, webhook test path, credential-absent desktop behavior, and free-first external-services boundaries.

Name: Support and privacy-safe logging
Outcome: Failures are recoverable and logs are useful without exposing private data
Details: Confirm visible recovery for bad transcripts, malformed URLs, sync/API outage, package init failure, and storage corruption. Confirm logs avoid classroom/account payloads.

Name: Alpha field rehearsal
Outcome: Three realistic teacher/student scenarios pass end to end
Details: Run import, review, approve, publish, student dashboard, completion, and teacher review for at least three realistic session types.

Name: Fix alpha blockers
Outcome: No known correctness or trust blockers remain from alpha rehearsal
Details: Fix correctness or trust issues, then run npm run test:all again.

Name: Hosted PWA polish
Details: Re-test landing, routes, downloads, add-to-home-screen, service worker, manifest, mobile readability, and sample-only demo boundaries.

Name: Entitlements and billing
Details: Verify free/paid boundaries, locked unpaid UI, upgrade/downgrade flows, and webhook-owned entitlement updates.

Name: State resilience
Outcome: Local data survives realistic failures without cross-user leakage
Details: Re-run encrypted local state, crash recovery, backup/restore, repeated imports, 100+ student roster, and no cross-user/project leakage checks.

Name: Accessibility finish
Outcome: ClassLoop is usable by keyboard, screen reader users, and phone/PWA users
Details: Run keyboard navigation, focus order, contrast, labels/announcements, and phone-width readability checks. Fix blockers.

Name: Ops runbooks
Outcome: Bad releases and outages have a practiced response
Details: Run rollback and incident drills; confirm support triage, bad release quarantine, sync/auth/billing outage behavior, and parser regression response.

Name: Public beta packet
Details: Prepare teacher onboarding, alpha script, release notes, support FAQ, download links/fallbacks, and a short launch announcement.

Name: Low-babysitting review
Outcome: Product has a clear weekly maintenance cadence and known limits
Details: Confirm green gates, known limits, support loop, weekly maintenance cadence, and what still needs a human before broader public signups.

Name: Ship or hold
Outcome: Public beta ships only if core gates are green
Details: Ship if hosted smoke, package checks, legal gate, support loop, and alpha trust criteria are green. Otherwise hold with a one-page blocker list.
